title: Lords of the Realm II
notes: Minor texture error in launcher still shows play button but behind it is white. In game works better then windows as you don't have to go through compatibility errors

Launcher has no CSS styles and images, only bare links. I was unable to scroll map down and right with my mouse (game map, battle and editor), which was a major inconvenience. Otherwise works flawlessly.
